TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ulaljuc, title = Ulaljuc, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ulaljuc} }

S.FORM: alang Ulaljuc ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 915 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 896 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ulaljuc hya' ga Puljetji. tay 'zil na Ulaljuc hya' ga Qapedang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ulaljuc ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 915 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 896 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ulaljuc hya' ga Puljetji. tay 'zil na Ulaljuc hya' ga Qapedang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ulaljuʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli*%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na ulaljuʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa puljetji. taj ʔzil na ulaljuʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa qape*aŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
